name: Noble International Ltd.
description: Noble International, Ltd. was a prominent supplier of automotive parts, component assemblies, and value-added services, specializing in laser welding technology for the automotive industry. Headquartered in Troy, Michigan, the company provided advanced auto body solutions to global automotive manufacturers. In 2008, Noble International was acquired by ArcelorMittal, the world's largest steel producer at the time, as part of a strategic move to integrate its laser-welded blanking operations into ArcelorMittal's global automotive steel business. The company was previously listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol NOBL.
